name: Atlantis Coin v3
description: Atlantis Coin (ATC) is a cryptocurrency that holds a United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) registration. It is a green cryptocurrency that seeks to serve as the native token for the Atlantis Chain and the Atlantis Ecosystem. The Atlantis Ecosystem encompasses various services such as Atlantis Wallet, Atlantis Exchange, Atlantis Pay, and Atlantis BaaS. The coin was initially launched in May 2021 and later migrated to BSC in January 2022. The Atlantis Chain, a blockchain that aims to offer speed and energy efficiency, is currently under development and testing.
